Lines.ui.pause.title: Pause
Lines.ui.settings.title: Settings
Lines.ui.tutorial.1: Hi, grandson! It's been a while since we last spoke. I can't come see you because everything's flooded and the world has turned gray.
Lines.ui.tutorial.2: Figure out what's going on here.
Lines.ui.tutorial.3:
Go to the car. E — steer or exit.
A/D — roll, W — forward, S — backward, mouse — turn, Space — up, Ctrl — down.
Lines.ui.tutorial.4: Find a person on one of the islands you can talk to.
Lines.ui.tutorial.5: To talk, approach them and press E.
Lines.ui.tutorial.6: The person needs color; to make it, collect resources.
Lines.ui.tutorial.7: Take the axe from the roof (LMB) and hit the tree with it. Collect 3 logs.
Lines.ui.tutorial.8: Also, collect resin in the trunk (LMB to collect).
Lines.ui.tutorial.9: Also, collect resin in the trunk (LMB to collect).
Lines.ui.tutorial.10: And now, go into the trunk!
Lines.ui.tutorial.11: What a surprise! There is a whole world in my car
Lines.ui.tutorial.12: These are your little monsters — they provide pigment for flowers.
Lines.ui.tutorial.13: Take the brush from the storage (LMB) and stroke the monster until the pigment drops.
Lines.ui.tutorial.14: Monsters have needs and the quality of produced pigment depends on them. In order to feed them, you need to sow the seeds from the outside world
Lines.ui.tutorial.15: Volume is dependent on health, saturation - on happiness. You can look it up in the book (TAB).
Lines.ui.tutorial.16: The raw pigment needs to be ground into powder. Find a mortar and place the pigment in it.
Lines.ui.tutorial.17: Take the pounder(LMB), move it up and down, and hit the mortar until it's ground.
Lines.ui.tutorial.18: If you place multiple pigments in the mortar, they will mix together when crushed!
Lines.ui.tutorial.19: Place the ground pigment of the desired color in the <color=blue>Infuser</color>.
Lines.ui.tutorial.20: If you need a darker color, add resin using the valve on the pipe on the right.
Lines.ui.tutorial.21: Throw some wood into the firebox. The temperature gauge will begin to fill.
Lines.ui.tutorial.22: Paint can only be made at <color=orange>maximum temperature</color>, so don't spare the wood!
Lines.ui.tutorial.23: Pull the lever (LMB) when the <color=orange> indicator fills the gauge, and the paint is ready!
Lines.ui.tutorial.24: Take the finished paint to the man and talk to him.
Lines.ui.tutorial.25: Some items can be transferred between two worlds.
Lines.ui.tutorial.26: That's it, you're on your own from here (T - close).
Lines.ui.tutorial.27: It seems the monster is hungry. Find some seeds outside, put them in the trunk, and plant them in the garden.

Tip of the day: don't touch game files please
